purpose: Populate internal GTM page variables without sending a GA4 event
trigger: Once per page after analytics consent
parameters: page_name; page_type; content_group; page_language; page_path; debug_mode
privacy_notes: Internal setup event; excluded from the GA4 custom-event trigger
testing_steps: Grant analytics consent; inspect the data layer; confirm no GA4 event tag fires for page_context

purpose: Measure meaningful consultation, treatment and content calls to action
trigger: Click on an explicitly annotated CTA
parameters: cta_text; cta_url; cta_location; cta_purpose; page_name; page_type; content_group
deduplication: One delegated click handler and one priority classification
privacy_notes: Only fixed public button text and query-free internal paths
testing_steps: Use GTM Preview; click one hero and one body CTA; confirm one event per click

trigger: Click on WhatsApp, telephone or email links
deduplication: Contact classification takes priority over outbound and CTA
privacy_notes: Telephone numbers, email addresses and WhatsApp query text are never sent
testing_steps: Test WhatsApp, telephone and email links; confirm method only and no destination value

purpose: Measure visits to confirmed social profiles
trigger: Click on an explicitly classified social link
deduplication: Social classification takes priority over outbound
privacy_notes: No profile query string or personal value is sent
testing_steps: Click Instagram in the top bar and footer; confirm one social_click each

purpose: Measure genuine external destinations not classified elsewhere
trigger: Click on an external HTTP(S) link
deduplication: Priority classifier excludes contact, social and downloads
privacy_notes: Only hostname and fixed public link text are sent; full URLs and queries are excluded
testing_steps: Click the Google Reviews link; confirm outbound_click only

trigger: Click on a link ending in a supported document extension
deduplication: Download classification takes priority over outbound
privacy_notes: No image loads or query strings are tracked
testing_steps: Add or use a test PDF link; click once; confirm file_download only

trigger: Click on a real data-lang language link to the other language
deduplication: No event when the target language equals the current language
testing_steps: Use the top-bar switcher in both directions; confirm no event on initial page load

trigger: First focus, input or change on a non-hidden field
deduplication: WeakSet allows one event per form per page
privacy_notes: No field name, value, contact detail, message or health information is read
testing_steps: Focus two fields in each form; confirm exactly one form_start

purpose: Measure a valid confirmed submission attempt
trigger: Custom lifecycle event after validation and endpoint availability
deduplication: Form code emits once while loading state blocks repeat submission
privacy_notes: No FormData or field values enter the event
testing_steps: Try invalid submit first; then complete a test form; confirm form_submit only for the valid attempt

purpose: Measure client or server submission problems safely
trigger: Custom validation, endpoint or fetch failure lifecycle event
deduplication: One event per known failed attempt
privacy_notes: Only coarse error type and count; no invalid contents or server response body
testing_steps: Submit empty required fields and simulate a failed endpoint; inspect safe parameters

purpose: Confirm the form backend accepted a submission
trigger: Successful Formspree HTTP response or legitimate pending thank-you fallback
deduplication: Session lead record prevents fallback repetition
testing_steps: Mock or perform a successful test; confirm one success and no repeat on refresh

purpose: Count a confirmed contact or consultation lead
deduplication: Short-lived random session token; generated flag survives refresh/back navigation
privacy_notes: Token is never sent and contains no form data; accessibility feedback is not treated as a lead
testing_steps: Confirm one lead after success; visit/refresh thank-you; verify no duplicate; direct thank-you must produce none

purpose: Measure engagement with fixed public questions
trigger: First meaningful open of each annotated details item per page
deduplication: WeakSet fires each item at most once per page
privacy_notes: Question is fixed public content; no user-entered text
testing_steps: Open, close and reopen one FAQ; confirm one event; open another and confirm its position

purpose: Measure considered visibility of meaningful content sections
deduplication: Set fires each annotated section once per page
privacy_notes: Fixed heading and structural identifiers only
testing_steps: Slowly scroll a long page; confirm each visible section fires once after the dwell threshold

purpose: Measure reading depth at custom milestones
deduplication: Set fires each threshold once; GA4 automatic scroll must be disabled
testing_steps: Scroll down and back up; confirm each threshold appears once

trigger: 30, 60 and 120 seconds of focused visible-tab time
deduplication: Set fires each threshold once; counter pauses without consent, focus or visibility
privacy_notes: No identity, input or background-tab time
testing_steps: Keep tab focused for 30 seconds; hide it during another test; verify paused counting

purpose: Collect one privacy-safe field performance snapshot
trigger: Five seconds after window load or after later analytics consent
parameters: lcp_ms; cls_score; inp_ms; ttfb_ms; dom_content_loaded_ms; page_load_ms; page_name; page_type
testing_steps: Grant consent; wait at least five seconds; confirm finite numeric values and one event

purpose: Detect limited technical failures without collecting messages
trigger: Runtime error, unhandled rejection or resource load error
deduplication: Identical keys deduplicated and capped at five events per page
privacy_notes: No message, stack, query string, page HTML or form value
testing_steps: Throw a controlled test error with debug enabled; verify only type, basename and line bucket

trigger: Existing cookie controls grant analytics consent or update preferences while granted
deduplication: One site consent event feeds one analytics bridge; denied choices are not GA events in basic mode
privacy_notes: Category states and fixed source only; GTM stays unloaded for rejection
testing_steps: Reject first and verify no GTM request; grant analytics and confirm one consent_update before GTM initialization
